concerns.detail: Real full names of students (Yufei Ding, Haoran Geng) and extensive personal details including academic misconduct allegations, romantic relationships, and admissions status sufficient to identify private individuals.
concerns.excerpt: Yufei Ding (PKU) 不是只放prof吗怎么学生也开出来了.. 注意这不是丁老师，是同名学生...今年stanford的phd，haoran geng 的女朋友，纯学术妲 己,考试还作弊

concerns.detail: Pure personal insult without substantive criticism of advising practices.
Deletion of substantive content about advisor Emory Liang Zhao regarding AI paper writing and student paper mill practices, appearing to suppress legitimate observations rather than perform cleanup.
concerns.excerpt: Emory Liang Zhao（再TM删给你发一亩三分地）...和学生用ai写预印本的水文王，学生网上找车队拼车写一堆垃圾preprint刷文章数和互引
